name: canopy-bench-rn
description: RND-5 RN 0.76.9 sibling of the Canopy head-to-head benchmark app. App.js/index.js/app.json are the portable sources; scripts/init-rn-project.sh drops them onto a freshly-scaffolded RN 0.76.9 project (which carries the android/ + ios/ native shell + Metro). Pinned to RN 0.76.9 — the version Canopy/native is ABI-locked to (vendor.lock.json).

scripts.bundle:android: react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res
